overall_summary: elizaOS has expanded its payment infrastructure by adding default payment methods for x402 routes and completed a major repository consolidation, merging ElizaCloud into the main eliza monorepo.
key_facts: elizaOS and DegenAI were added as default payment methods in elizaOS for x402 routes as of May 6.
ElizaCloud has been consolidated into the main eliza repository at github.com/elizaOS/eliza, migrating away from Vercel to container solutions.
Shaw clarified the project operates as a fair launch without VC backing or a traditional formal team structure.
The eliza-1 model training effort has transitioned to using Qwen as the base model with dflash speculative decoding and turboquant optimizations.
Jupiter integration was migrated to the official api.jup.ag endpoint with mandatory API key authentication.
The Slack plugin (@elizaos/plugin-slack) was migrated into the monorepo from its standalone repository.
PR #7197 introduced @elizaos/vault, a cross-platform secrets vault with AES-256-GCM encryption at rest.
Headless Linux segfaults (Issue #7231) and Telegram polling race conditions (Issue #7245) were resolved to improve system uptime.
open_questions: What's expected costs of running Eliza on cloud for a twitter bot? and is it even possible on a Mac mini or not?
Does elizaos still connect to Hyperfy?

new_issues_prs.title: feat(vault): @elizaos/vault — cross-platform secrets vault + Settings UI integration
new_issues_prs.author: Dexploarer
new_issues_prs.significance: Implements secure, encrypted storage for secrets like API keys across different operating systems.

new_issues_prs.title: feat(slack): migrate plugin-slack into the monorepo
new_issues_prs.author: 2-A-M
new_issues_prs.significance: Consolidates the last major standalone connector into the main workspace for better maintenance.

new_issues_prs.title: feat(cloud): support monetized container app domains
new_issues_prs.author: NubsCarson
new_issues_prs.significance: Enables billing and domain management for agent-built monetized cloud applications.

overall_focus.claim: The team focused on hardening core infrastructure, resolving Linux segfaults, and consolidating the monorepo architecture to improve reliability and scaling.

discord_updates.summary: Key announcements regarding payment infrastructure milestones and project governance clarifications. Shaw addressed concerns about the lack of VC backing and the shift toward a builder-centric model.
Technical inquiries focused on deployment feasibility (Mac mini, cloud costs) and specific connectivity statuses like Hyperfy.

user_feedback.feedback_summary: Community members reported inconsistent bot replies on Telegram due to polling races between the plugin and core wrappers.

strategic_insights.insight: The introduction of x402 payment routes and monetized container domains suggests a shift toward self-sustaining architecture independent of traditional funding.
implications_or_questions: How will the platform revenue be distributed among independent builders?
Does this accelerate the transition from memecoin status to infrastructure tool?

market_analysis.observation: V3 price movement saw gains of 90-130%, with community members comparing performance to Zerebro and targetting previous 2 billion market cap highs.
market_analysis.relevance: Reflects high community confidence and speculative interest following technical deliveries.
